overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant neon-lit downtown district. The character moves along sidewalks past futuristic architecture, crosses an intersection, and observes the bustling cyberpunk cityscape with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with neon storefronts and steam vents

events.description: camera tilts up toward bright sun causing significant lens flare and glare
character turns left to follow sidewalk alongside red neon structure

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk past corner buildings with red neon trim and steam vents

entered.detail: modern building with distinctive red neon trim and curved facade
street-level steam vent emitting white vapor onto the sidewalk
tall modern street lamp with orange glowing light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a walk along a sunlit downtown sidewalk in a futuristic city. The camera moves past a corner building with prominent red neon edging while steam rises from a street vent. The character continues forward before turning left to follow the sidewalk path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside red neon fence with advertisements

events.description: NPC with red mohawk briefly blocks view while walking ahead of camera
view through fence mesh reveals construction barriers and equipment in adjacent lot

agents.ego_description: walking steadily alongside red neon fence following an NPC with distinctive red mohawk hairstyle

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of ego with red mohawk and black leather vest

entered.detail: long red structure with bright pink neon trim and wire mesh screening
large advertisement on fence showing robotic hand and text DYNALAR
tall cylindrical building wrapped with multiple levels of digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The character now walks along a narrow path beside a striking red fence illuminated with pink neon. An NPC with a red mohawk walks ahead, leading the way. Through the fence mesh, construction equipment is visible while the massive circular advertising tower dominates the background skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalks and elevated overpass

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk beside fence into open intersection with multiple crosswalks
green vintage sports car drives past as ego approaches crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at intersection while observing traffic and surrounding billboards

notable_agents.action: green vintage-style sports car driving through intersection

entered.detail: elevated highway structure crossing above the intersection
multi-story building with large HOTEL signage and Japanese characters
large purple digital billboard displaying WET DREAM text
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide intersection as the character leaves the fenced sidewalk behind. The character steps onto the crosswalk as a green sports car passes by. The circular advertising tower now dominates the center view while a hotel building with bright signage becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with hotel facade and active traffic

events.description: character stops walking and stands at crosswalk to observe surroundings and traffic

agents.ego_description: standing at crosswalk observing the hotel facade and passing traffic

entered.detail: suspended traffic signals above the intersection
steam vent emitting vapor in front of the hotel entrance

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a stop at the intersection crosswalk, facing the hotel building with Japanese signage. Steam rises from a vent near the hotel entrance while various pedestrians cross the street. The camera pans slightly to take in the surrounding traffic and urban details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic downtown district that gradually opens from a narrow sidewalk into a bustling urban intersection. It begins by moving past a corner building with red neon edging and rising steam before turning left to follow a pedestrian path. As the camera progresses, the view is framed by a pink neon-lit fence and a leading NPC with a red mohawk, revealing construction equipment and a massive circular advertising tower in the distance. The scene then expands as the character leaves the fence behind and steps onto a crosswalk, where a green sports car passes by and the advertising tower centers the skyline. Finally, the movement comes to a halt facing a hotel with Japanese signage and rising steam, while the camera pans slightly to capture the surrounding traffic and pedestrians.
